name: punchwall-train-and-break
description: Validate the early gameplay loop through the same server functions used by ClickDetectors.

args.code:
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation", 5)
assert(command, "missing PunchWallAutomation")
return HttpService:JSONEncode(command:Invoke("Reset"))

steps.label: pause continuous training before wall reward assertion

args.code:
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local command = game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation")
local before = command:Invoke("SetStats", { TrainingActive = 0 }).Power
local result = command:Invoke("BreakWall", "Brick Wall", 8)
return HttpService:JSONEncode({ ok = result.ok, outcome = result.outcome, before = before, after = result.Power, unchanged = result.Power == before, Coins = result.Coins, WallLevel = result.WallLevel, BrickWallBroken = result.BrickWallBroken })

steps.label: brick break grants coins without power
